creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
Changes:
  - Upgrade to Apache 1.3.19
  - Alpha FrontPage Ext (OSF1) install for FreeBSD/alpha.
  - FreeBSD FrontPage Ext install (define WANT_FREEBSD_EXT)

NOTE: The change to support FreeBSD/Alpha hasn't been tested.
      Any FreeBSD/Alpha users want to test?

Fix: Changed Files:           New Files:
        Makefile                 files/change_server.alpha
        distinfo                 files/change_server.bsdi
        files/patch-ag           files/fp_install.alpha
        files/patch-fa           files/fp_install.bsdi
        files/patch-fb           pkg-message.bsdi
        files/patch-lang.en      pkg-message.freebsd
        pkg-install
        pkg-plist
